---
title: "Comparative FT-IR Spectroscopy Salivary Profiles of University Students: E-Cigarette Users vs Nonusers"
date: 2026-01-13
author:
  - name: Ferreira, Camila Lopes
  - name: Rocha, Emanuelly Caroline Dos Santos
  - name: Reis, Yasmin Ferreira Azevedo Dos
  - name: Zanon Guimarães, Raphael
  - name: Silva, Sara Maria Santos Dias Da
  - name: Paiva, Rodrigo Teodoro Gomes De
  - name: Moraes, Jean Patrick Dos Santos
  - name: Dos Santos, Laurita
  - name: Carvalho, Luis Felipe Das Chagas E Silva De
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "ACS Omega"
  volume: 11
  issue: 1
  doi: "10.1021/acsomega.5c10219"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Comparative FT-IR Spectroscopy Salivary Profiles of University Students: E-Cigarette Users vs Nonusers</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
